creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
	I'm requesting an exp-run and approval of attached patch.  Patch also available at http://people.freebsd.org/~zeising/xorg-mesaupdate.diff .
	To apply the patch, use svn patch /path/to/file, I'm not sure that patch works.
	Please add WITH_NEW_XORG= to /etc/make.conf or equivalent before starting the run.
